Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add OpenClaw auto-trader module

New copy-trading bot that follows SoulWinners elite wallet signals.
Goal: Turn $15 → $10k

Features:
- Jupiter DEX integration for Solana swaps
- Position manager with database persistence
- Trading strategy with stop-loss and take-profits
- Automatic entry on elite wallet buys \(BES > 1000\)
- Exit rules: -20% stop, +50% TP1, +100% TP2
- Momentum detection for holding runners
- Telegram notifications for all trades
- /trader command for status monitoring

Files:
- trader/solana_dex.py - Jupiter swap integration
- trader/position_manager.py - Track positions and P&L
- trader/strategy.py - Entry/exit logic
- trader/openclaw.py - Main trading bot
- run_openclaw.py - Runner script
- docs/OPENCLAW.md - Documentation
- deploy/openclaw.service - systemd service

Integration:
- SoulWinners pushes signals to internal queue
- OpenClaw processes queue and executes trades
- Real-time P&L tracking and goal progress

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
